---
title: "Session Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
params:
  session_id: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4, dpi = 120)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "session_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "change_point_detection.R"))

session_id <- params$session_id
sa         <- session_analysis(session_id)
cp         <- change_point_detection(session_id)

theme_report <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", colour = "#1E3A5F"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

<div style="background:#1E3A5F;color:white;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:24px">
<strong>Course:</strong> `r sa$session_meta$course_code` – `r sa$session_meta$course_title`<br/>
<strong>Lecturer:</strong> `r sa$session_meta$lecturer_name`<br/>
<strong>Start:</strong> `r sa$session_meta$actual_start` &nbsp;·&nbsp;
<strong>Students Present:</strong> `r sa$n_present`
</div>

## 1. Engagement Timeline

```{r eng-timeline}
et <- sa$engagement_timeline
if (nrow(et) > 0) {
  cp_times <- as.POSIXct(cp$changepoints)
  p <- ggplot(et, aes(x = captured_at, y = engagement_val)) +
    geom_line(colour = "#BDD7EE", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = smooth_eng), colour = "#1565C0", linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(x = "Time", y = "Engagement", title = "Class Engagement Over Session",
         subtitle = "Blue = smoothed (5-point rolling avg)") +
    theme_report
  if (length(cp_times) > 0)
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(cp_times),
                        linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", alpha = 0.6)
  print(p)
} else {
  cat("No engagement data available.")
}
```

## 2. Per-Student Concentration

```{r conc-heatmap}
ch <- sa$conc_heatmap
if (nrow(ch) > 0) {
  ggplot(ch, aes(x = reorder(student_name, avg_conc), y = 1, fill = avg_conc)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#E74C3C", high = "#27AE60",
                        limits = c(0, 100), name = "Focus") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Student", y = "", title = "Per-Student Average Concentration") +
    theme_report +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
} else {
  cat("No concentration data available.")
}
```

## 3. Emotion Distribution

```{r emo-dist}
ed <- sa$emotion_dist
if (nrow(ed) > 0) {
  emo_colors <- c(happy="#27AE60", engaged="#2980B9", neutral="#95A5A6",
                  confused="#F39C12", sad="#8E44AD", angry="#E74C3C",
                  surprised="#16A085", fearful="#E67E22", disgusted="#5D6D7E")
  ggplot(ed, aes(x = reorder(emotion, -count), y = count, fill = emotion)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.55) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = emo_colors) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Snapshots", title = "Emotion Distribution") +
    theme_report
} else {
  cat("No emotion data available.")
}
```

## 4. Alerts Log

```{r alerts-log}
al <- sa$alerts
if (nrow(al) > 0) {
  al %>%
    select(any_of(c("alert_type","severity","message","triggered_at"))) %>%
    kable(col.names = c("Type","Severity","Message","Triggered At")) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"))
} else {
  cat("No alerts during this session.")
}
```

## 5. Engagement Change Points

```{r cp-summary}
if (length(cp$changepoints) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("Engagement shifts detected at: %s",
              paste(format(as.POSIXct(cp$changepoints), "%H:%M"), collapse = ", ")))
} else {
  cat("No significant engagement change points detected.")
}
```

---
*Generated by EduVision Analytics · `r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B %Y %H:%M")`*
